text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I didn't think the cafe's new drink was gonna be this bitter...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: That aroma... Ah, yes... That's an espresso.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...You can add two to three spoons of sugar to it
to make it taste milder.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Wha? B-but... wouldn't add'n sugar make me look
like a big dweeb?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Coffee is an indulgence. It's meant to be drunk
in whatever way you want.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: The way I want? Well, in that case...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I wanna try and drink it bitter! 'Cause that's what
a city girl would do!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...In Italy, where espresso comes from, adding
sugar is called drinking it "city style"...
apparently.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Really?! "City style", you say?! Um, well, in that
case...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: I'll just add... a lil' sugar.
